班拿貝朝聖指南


機票
因航會有直航機，飛大概15個鐘，我好似未見過fanfares有做過馬德里既優惠 (復活節買因航機票六千幾直飛馬德里)
中東三寶，計埋轉機至少都要19個鐘，我上次搭emirates來回大概$4xxx，飛大概20個鐘

波飛
經官網買飛最平，比賽前一個定二個星期開始賣飛，不過有分優先次序，club member > madridista > public
班拿貝球場出面亦都有個官方櫃台可以俾你買飛，都係比賽前一個定二個星期開始賣飛，每日都會有飛分批出售
另外官方櫃台出面都有堆人坐係度會係咁問你係咪買飛
如果係官網買唔到，可以去viagogo, stubhub度買，佢地多數可以一早買定黎緊嗰季既飛，不過通常都係炒價 （我上次係用viagogo買，睇主場對西維爾，坐係同球員通道隔一個block最前排大概$3xxx，y絲睇馬德里打吡，坐兩邊上方，近3000元。）
*注意：賽事有可能會改期，提前好多買飛既巴打自己留意

Tour Bernabéu
可以參觀班拿貝球場、皇家馬德里博物館、球員休息室、領隊座位與球員後備席
門票: €25 (手持Madridista: €17)
開放時間：10:00-19:30 (星期一及星期六)、10:30-18:30 (星期日及假期)
*注意：比賽日開放時間會提早結束，有d地方唔會開放，巴打自己留意

Madridista
即場做madridista有優惠，平過上網申請
另外球場入面間Adidas madridista有95折，ultra boost嗰啲鞋都照樣有折

交通
去班拿貝球場好方便，metro直頭有個班拿貝站，班拿貝站係深藍色10號線，車站兩個出口都係一抬頭就見到球場
開波前一個鐘左右就入得場

以上資訊由duckyea!、潺仔、Y_nada_mas、🔥卻老提供

蘇拿利劍指歐聯四連冠：冇嘢冇可能

皇馬教練蘇拿利表示球隊有力爭逐歐聯四連霸。

蘇拿利認為任何事都有可能，相信皇馬可以取得歐聯四連霸。

皇馬要再衛冕，就要先在16強過阿積士一關，蘇拿利表示絕不易應付。

「阿積士有很出名的青訓體系，完美配合到他們的進攻風格。他們一直都保持這個傳統，從上屆賽事都今屆賽事都看到，今圈比賽必定很難踢。」

皇馬現時在聯賽以6分落後巴塞，在歐聯16強首回合對阿積士後，皇馬會回到西甲對基羅納，月尾再於西盃次回合主場對巴塞。(Goal.com)

Seedorf: Real Madrid are always special in the Champions League

With two of his former clubs in Ajax and Real Madrid set to do battle in the Champions League, Clarence Seedorf believes Los Blancos has a special relationship with the competition.

As a winner of the Champions League with both clubs, the legendary midfielder will have split allegiances, as he made clear in an exclusive interview with MARCA.

Two of your former teams, Ajax and Real Madrid, will meet in the Champions League, who do you believe is the favourite?

"Real Madrid is the favourite, because they are the defending champions and they have significant experience in the Champions League. Now this doesn't mean that they will 100% win, but Real Madrid in the Champions League are always special."

歐聯4連霸？蘇拿利：皇馬沒不可能的事

【now.com體育】皇家馬德里上季歷史性連贏第3屆歐聯，今季能否再下一城？教練蘇拿利坦言凡事無絕對。

歐聯16強在今周重燃烽火，皇家馬德里在周三首回合將作客阿積士。銀河艦隊最近勢頭正盛，先賽和巴塞隆拿，再輕取馬德里體育會，對於連贏4屆歐聯的機會，蘇拿利（Santiago Solari）表示：「對於皇馬來說，沒有不可能的事。」

上位後為皇馬撥亂反正，蘇拿利認為球場就是追夢的地方，失敗後總有彩虹：「有時候，夢想不會實現，希望會被幻滅。足球令你要重新出發，把自己拯救，同時給予你機會，就是在下一場比賽繼續追逐夢想。」

阿積士今場有下季將加盟巴塞隆拿的中場主將法蘭基迪莊因大腿傷患缺陣，皇馬似乎大有機會先拔頭籌。

Marcelo on Cristiano Ronaldo's Real Madrid exit: "I had to lie"

Discussing Cristiano's departure from Real Madrid, Marcelo made an interesting admission in an interview with Esporte Interativo.

Marcelo: Ronaldo told me about exit before Kiev final

Speaking to the journalist Tatiana Mantovani, Marcelo reveals that Cristiano told him he had decided to leave the Bernabéu in the week before May's Champions League final against Liverpool, which saw Los Blancos beat Liverpool 3-1 to claim their 13th European crown.

Here is Marcelo's conversation with Mantovani:

Marcelo: "Holy shit, we were training for the final and he [Ronaldo] said to me: 'I'm leaving.'"

Mantovani: "He told you before the final? That means you lied to me."

Marcelo: "Yes, I had to lie to you."

Had told Mantovani otherwise when asked about CR7

Marcelo appears to have kept his knowledge of Cristiano's exit to himself, at least when subsequently asked about it by Mantovani, until the striker's move to Serie A champions Juventus was confirmed six weeks after the final in Kiev.

【now.com體育】語言天份不足？皇家馬德里老將馬些路（Marcelo）大爆，多年隊友加里夫巴利的西班牙語水平，至今只能說出4個單字，令人失笑。

不經不覺，威爾斯球星加里夫巴利由熱刺加盟皇家馬德里已經第6個年頭，但西班牙語未有任何進步。

巴西後衛馬些路（Marcelo）先談到兩位已離隊的隊友：「基斯坦奴朗拿度和我關係要好，我的家人與他和女友，經常一起外出，我們做了9年隊友，對他離去感到傷心是自然的事。同樣地，卡斯拿斯以前在更衣室坐我旁邊，沒有他，我也感到傷心。」

「現在，巴利坐我對面，但他的西班牙語很差，他只說英語，目前只能說西班牙語單字Hi、Hello、Good wine（好酒），所以我們交流甚少。」馬些路補充道。

巴利雖已加盟皇馬6年，但西班牙語如此差勁，實在抵打屁股。

Courtois eyeing the treble: "We want to win all of the competitions we're in"

Thibaut Courtois gave an interview published in today's edition of ABC in which he spoke about his decision to sign for Real Madrid among other topics.


Dream come true: "I don't know any player that wouldn't want to play for Real Madrid. I was really happy at Chelsea, I felt completely integrated at the club and I had great team mates. Zero problems. But Real Madrid came knocking and obviously when Madrid show an interest, it's the biggest call you can get in football".

Ribbed about 2014 final

Dressing room banter about the 2014 Champions League final: "Of course there were a few jokes by the lads about that final. I've always given the best of myself wherever I have been and now I am giving my best for Real Madrid".

Atlético fans throwing toy rats: "Well, that was just a lot of hot air more than anything else. I've always been very respectful to all fans from rival clubs and naturally, I am going to be respectful to Atlético fans. I have no hard feelings at all about that. I spent three years at Atlético and I gave the best I had to win the trophies that we won".

Relationship with Keylor: "It's about developing your own work as part of a whole in which every component has to be able to function freely. Each player in the squad depends on the others. My relationship with Keylor is very good. He's a great keeper and I feel happy having a player like Keylor in the team. Where others see problems, I see solutions because the team has good players in every position".

Cristiano's departure: "He's a living legend at Real Madrid. The club's most recent history has been written, in the most part, with the goals he scored. I suffered facing Cristiano as a rival and he's a brilliant player but at Real Madrid I'm reminded of an old Santiago Bernabéu phrase which I am in agreement with - that 'No player is more important than all of the others'".

LaLiga, Copa and Champions League

Aspiring to win the treble: "I'm not in any doubt at all - Real Madrid aspires to win every competition it plays in. The proof of that can be seen in training every day. We have a well-balanced team and some of the best players in the world in their position. I don't know one single professional in the game who, with their hand on their heart, thinks that Real Madrid won't be in the battle for every competition we're in. Everyone in the squad aspires to winning the lot. And we've already won the Club World Cup".

Solari getting Madrid back on track: "We were exactly the same when Lopetegui was coach - the only difference was that things weren't going our way. These are just things have no explanation in football. Sometimes things take a radical change when a new coach comes in"

Jovic: Real Madrid reportedly nip ahead of Barça with €45m bid


Bild says Madrid have sought to steal a march on their LaLiga rivals by putting in an offer for Luka Jovic, who has starred in Germany this term.

Madrid have tabled 45m-euro bid for Jovic, says Bild

Fresh from Frankfurter Allgemeine Zeitung yesterday reporting Barça's interest in snapping up the 21-year-old, Bild has today insisted that Madrid are preparing to gazump their arch rivals - and have made Eintracht an offer.

Jovic is in the second year of a two-season loan at Eintracht, a deal that includes a purchase option - worth somewhere between six and 12 million euros - that the Germans plan to exercise. According to Bild, Los Blancos would then be ready to step in and pay 45 million for a player whose value has rocketed this term.

Indeed, the specialist website Transfermarkt.com has increased Jovic's expected market price twice already this term: from 12 million at the start of the campaign to 20 million in October, and up again to 40 million in December.

Jovic among Europa League's leading marksmen too

In addition to his impressive haul of Bundesliga goals, the Serbia international has also hit five in the Europa League, just one fewer than the competition's top scorer this season, RB Salzburg's Munas Dabbur.

皇家馬德里與阿積士將在歐聯16強相遇，雖然外界普遍相信力爭4連霸的「銀河艦隊」能輕鬆過關，但佐迪告魯夫卻持相反意見，認為缺少基斯坦奴朗拿度下的皇馬非如想像中強大。

不少人也認為皇馬抽得「上上籤」，但出身阿積士青訓的佐迪告魯夫卻深信母會絕非「輸梗」：「無論如何一隊球隊也需要超級球星，在關鍵時候他們往往是入球保證。現在皇馬著重整體多於個人，但我認為他們仍然需要C朗在陣。如果賽事踢成0：0，正正就是有否球星的差別。」

皇馬近日有巴西新星雲尼斯奧斯祖利亞表現搶鏡，但佐迪告魯夫卻認為要把對方視為C朗接班人絕不公平，「他年青也有天份，表現也絕對配得上身價。但現在就要他擔起球隊絕不公平，要求他擔任這樣的角色也絕不公平。」（Goal.com）

泰拔高圖爾斯：冇人會拒絕皇馬

泰拔高圖爾斯坦言他之前在車路士過得開心，但認為世界上沒有球員會拒絕加盟皇家馬德里的機會。

這位在2018年轉投「銀河艦隊」的門將表示：「我不認識任何不想為皇馬效力的球員。我在車路士確實很開心，完全融入了球隊，也有很好的隊友，沒任何問題。只是皇馬來敲門了，當皇馬對你有興趣，這是你在足球壇最大的機會。」

泰拔高圖爾斯來投，C朗拿度卻轉會；高圖爾斯以「皇馬活著的傳奇」去形容該葡萄牙巨星，亦肯定對方的實力，但也補充：「我在皇馬想起一句班拿貝說法，我是同意的－－沒有一位球員重要過其他所有的人。」(Goal.com)

Real Madrid: four arrested in disturbances near team hotel

A group of Ajax ultras set off fireworks and bangers in the streets around Real Madrid's hotel in Amsterdam overnight, leading to several detentions.

A group of Ajax ultras set about causing a ruckus in the environs of Real Madrid’s team hotel in Amsterdam overnight on Wednesday, leading Dutch pólice and the Spanish club’s own security detail to comb the streets looking for the local fans, who used Fireworks and bangers in an attempt to ensure the visiting European champions enjoyed as Little rest as possible.

The ultras were not exactly sure of the location of Real’s hotel and so marauded around the De Pijp district of the Netherlands’ capital causing as much commotion as possible between 2:30 and 4:00 in the morning on Wednesday.

Four people were arrested during the disturbances, which mirrored those staged in Paris a year earlier when PSG fans laid siege to Madrid’s team hotel ahead of the match between the sides at the Parc des Princes.

【話題】阿積士6虎簡介

【now.com體育】差不多22年前，阿積士加時下半場建功，作客淘汰馬德里體育會出局，爆冷殺入歐聯4強。22年後，阿積士將於周三歐聯16強首回合主場迎戰皇家馬德里，期望能夠爆冷過關，以下是6名主力簡介：

年僅21歲的法蘭基迪莊（Frenkie de Jong）司職中場，被譽為「新告魯夫」，下季將以7500萬歐元改投巴塞隆拿，肯定會與皇馬再度交鋒。他的腳法細膩，閱讀能力超卓，傳送準繩，無疑是阿積士今季歐聯保持不敗的功臣，有可能近10年來最具天賦的荷蘭新星。

只有19歲的後衛馬菲斯迪歷特，目前已被利物浦、拜仁慕尼黑和曼城等勁旅視為獵物，不僅是雙槍將，指揮若定，能在後場發動攻勢，長傳到位，也有後上叩關能力，行政總裁雲達沙表示：「他就像踢了6、7年職業足球的球員，踢法非常成熟。」

上月，阿積士在左閘達利亞費高缺席的2場比賽，共失10球，其重要性不用言語。26歲的達利亞費高生於阿根廷，助攻力強，同時防守穩健，甚少失位，與杜辛泰迪治合作擦出火花，組成強而有力的「左路列車」，皇馬必須打醒十二分精神。

如果阿積士要撕破皇馬防線，摩洛哥指揮官薛耶治是關鍵人物。他是中場節拍器，有力控制比賽節奏，傳送出色，保護皮球能力佳，也能用簡單致命傳球拉開防線，更無懼任何後衛壓迫，今年才25歲，荷甲貢獻12球和8個助攻。

毫無疑問，阿積士防線今場將受到巨大壓力，門將奧拿拿必須用「鐵布衫」抵擋皇馬攻門。這位喀麥隆外援自從2015年加盟後，進步顯著，才有22歲，已展露出大將之風，反應極快，相信前途無限，被視為未來非洲最佳門將之一。

年僅21歲的雲迪碧克戰意旺盛，充滿領袖風範，也是球迷寵兒，出身阿積士青訓，閱讀能力和走位傳球相當老練，射門腳腳七注，更重要是心理質素良好，總能保持冷靜頭腦，吸引到熱刺、羅馬和車路士虎視眈眈。

歐聯前瞻：皇馬毋懼巨人殺手阿積士

皇家馬德里今季表現反覆兼經歷易帥風波，故歐聯16強面對「牌面」較弱的阿積士也絕非穩贏。不過作為球隊中場核心，卻奧斯始終信心十足，因在歐聯舞台他們往往踢高一線。

阿積士今季在分組賽面對勁旅拜仁慕尼黑兩度與對方戰成平手保持不敗，故亦有不少人相信這支荷甲勁旅可以扮演巨人殺手淘汰皇馬。不過卻奧斯認為球隊在歐聯舞台往往特別醒神，故絕對有力於客場先拔頭籌：「阿積士對我們一定是鬥志十足，這一點已在我們預計之中。面對拜仁時他們已經告訴大家球隊的實力多高。不過我們近年在歐聯面對任何對手也有不錯表現，否則也不會連贏3次冠軍。有兩點對我們很有利，一就是球隊氣氛非常不錯，第二則是我們對阿積士沒半點輕視之心。」

人腳方面，皇馬主要有艾斯高因背傷無緣上陣，而守將華拉尼日前亦因病缺席操練，暫時情況未明。（Goal.com）
